'''jasatha''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:mycoplasm|mycoplasm]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''male''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| j-s-th
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:mycoplasm|mycoplasm]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| male
|-
! Citation form
| jasatha
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:jæsæthæth|jæsæthæth]] || [[word:jæsæthæj|jæsæthæj]] || [[word:jæsæthæsh|jæsæthæsh]] || [[word:jæsæthæ|jæsæthæ]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:jasasathath|jasasathath]] || [[word:jasasathaj|jasasathaj]] || [[word:jasasathash|jasasathash]] || [[word:jasasatha|jasasatha]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:jasathath|jasathath]] || [[word:jasathaj|jasathaj]] || [[word:jasathash|jasathash]] || [[word:jasatha|jasatha]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:jasafthath|jasafthath]] || [[word:jasafthaj|jasafthaj]] || [[word:jasafthash|jasafthash]] || [[word:jasafthaf|jasafthaf]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for male singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:jasathatha|jasathatha]] || [[word:jasathaja|jasathaja]] || [[word:jasathasha|jasathasha]] || [[word:jasathaka|jasathaka]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:jasathath|jasathath]] || [[word:jasathaj|jasathaj]] || [[word:jasathash|jasathash]] || [[word:jasatha|jasatha]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:jasathathal|jasathathal]] || [[word:jasathajal|jasathajal]] || [[word:jasathashal|jasathashal]] || [[word:jasathakal|jasathakal]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:jasathathatha|jasathathatha]] || [[word:jasathajaja|jasathajaja]] || [[word:jasathashasha|jasathashasha]] || [[word:jasathaka|jasathaka]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:jasathathan|jasathathan]] || [[word:jasathajan|jasathajan]] || [[word:jasathashan|jasathashan]] || [[word:jasathakan|jasathakan]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:jasathathaoro|jasathathaoro]] || [[word:jasathajaoro|jasathajaoro]] || [[word:jasathashaoro|jasathashaoro]] || [[word:jasathakaoro|jasathakaoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki male nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|d2c7592}}
